description.overview: With their almost human-like expressions and big personality, Brussels Griffons are charming companions. They bond closely with their owners and can be quite comical.
description.history: The Brussels Griffon originated in Belgium.
description.temperament: Known for being alert, curious, loyal.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their rough or smooth coat coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: With their almost human-like expressions and big personality, Brussels Griffons are charming companions. They bond closely with their owners and can be quite comical.
